resultList.dtldesc: Premium 3 BHK Apartment for Sale in Sobha Brooklyn Towers, Hosur Road, Bangalore::::An exceptional opportunity to own a premium 3 BHK apartment in Sobha Brooklyn Towers at Town Park, located along the prominent Hosur Road corridor in Bangalore. Developed by SOBHA Limited, this newly constructed residence offers contemporary design, high-quality construction, and freehold ownership within a landmark residential development. Positioned on a higher floor with open views, the apartment is ideal for discerning homeowners seeking modern living in a well-connected urban setting.::::Property Specifications::::The apartment is situated on the 9th floor of a striking 38-storey residential tower and offers a thoughtfully planned layout with a carpet area of approximately 1,305 sq. ft. It comprises three bedrooms and three bathrooms, providing ample space and privacy for family living. Two balconies enhance natural light and ventilation while offering pleasant views overlooking the swimming pool and internal amenities. An additional study room adds functional flexibility, making the home suitable for work-from-home requirements. The apartment is east-facing, supporting bright interiors and a positive living environment. Offered in unfurnished condition, the property allows complete freedom for interior customisation. Classified as a new property and currently under construction, the apartment is available under freehold ownership, ensuring long-term security and value.::::Facilities::::The residential development is designed to deliver a comprehensive lifestyle experience with a range of well-planned facilities. Residents benefit from landscaped jogging and strolling tracks, outdoor tennis courts, and organised recreational areas. The building is equipped with service and goods lifts, visitor parking provisions, and laundry services to support daily convenience. The overall design reflects theme-based architectural planning, with carefully maintained common areas and modern infrastructure. Essential utilities such as water supply and power systems are integrated to support uninterrupted residential living.::::Locality::::Hosur Road is one of Bangalore’s major arterial corridors, offering excellent connectivity to key commercial hubs, employment centres, and established residential areas. The property’s location directly on Hosur Road ensures smooth access to major business districts, retail centres, healthcare facilities, and educational institutions. Public transport options are readily available, supporting efficient daily commuting. The surrounding area continues to witness strong infrastructure growth, making it a preferred residential destination for professionals and families. With its strategic location, premium development quality, and modern lifestyle offerings, Sobha Brooklyn Towers presents a compelling option for buyers seeking long-term value and urban convenience.
